justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax to jakarta and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it removes @SpringBootApplication and @Profile from HivereaderApplication.java without adding @SpringBootApplication, which will break the application context. Also, the test class still uses 'public class' instead of '@Test' method annotations properly (though the import is fixed, the test method itself isn't shown). The removal of spring-boot-starter-jdbc seems unnecessary and potentially breaking.
